reference: Hello. The symptoms are suggestive of an intestinal obstruction, as you are experiencing distension and pain. Please get an X-ray of the abdomen in a standing position and undergo enteroclysis. Once diagnosed, you may need surgery to release the causative agent.
text: Hello, the symptoms are suggestive of an intestinal obstruction. As you are experiencing distension, please get an x-ray of the abdomen in a standing position and undergo enteroclisis. Once diagnosed, you may need surgery to release the causative agent.
